event: Exterior of the Great Hall of Oakham Castle
description: A photograph of a medieval stone building — the Great Hall of Oakham Castle in England. The building features a steep pitched roof, Gothic-arched windows with tracery, and rough stone walls. A central doorway with a pointed arch provides the entrance. The building sits on a grassy lawn with some paved areas. Overcast sky above. The architecture is characteristic of 12th-century English Romanesque transitioning to Early Gothic.

_meta.title: Great Hall of Oakham Castle, England
